runTitle: v8.11.165 Production Chrome DevTools MCP - System Start/Stop State Contract
coveredSurfaces: Top-right profile dropdown system status label
Profile system stop action -> POST /api/system {action: stop}
Profile system start action -> POST /api/system {action: start}
Vercel production /api/system serverless Redis-backed running state
skippedSurfaces: AI chat conversational QA was not part of this UI state-contract check
OAuth provider end-to-end login was skipped; guest PIN login was used
Dashboard server card detail flow was not retested in this targeted rerun
Cloud Run admin observability endpoints were not part of this Vercel UI rerun

expertAssessments.rationale: The GitLab tag pipeline 2530528415 deployed v8.11.165 successfully, Vercel production reports the matching version/deployment, and the system start/stop state now uses the remote /api/system action result before local UI state changes.
The targeted rerun covered the previously failing state-contract paths with browser UI interaction plus network and API-state evidence.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period checked after production QA; effective usage about 10.0954 USD, billed 0.0000 USD.

artifacts.label: v8.11.165 system state toggle final running state

completedImprovements.title: System start UI proceeds to dashboard even when /api/system start returns success:false
completedImprovements.evidence: On v8.11.165, profile menu start sent POST /api/system with body {"action":"start"}; the response was HTTP 200 {success:true, action:"start"}, subsequent GET /api/system returned isRunning:true, and the UI returned to the active dashboard/open/stop state.
completedImprovements.note: The start action is no longer skipped by a background status fetch loading state.

completedImprovements.title: Profile dropdown system stop does not visibly clear running/dashboard state
completedImprovements.evidence: On v8.11.165, profile menu stop sent POST /api/system with body {"action":"stop"}; the response was HTTP 200 {success:true, action:"stop"}, subsequent GET /api/system returned isRunning:false, and the UI changed to the system-start state.
completedImprovements.note: The profile header no longer changes local state unless the remote system action actually returns a payload.

notes: GitLab tag pipeline 2530528415 succeeded for v8.11.165.
Vercel deployment dpl_EG1U8xTdXAvgrhLTLnW5NQmoznt5 is READY for commit 798de818384c6d183b351df2b82c6e84ce9840be.
Playwright MCP browser profile was locked earlier, so Chrome DevTools MCP was used for this release-facing targeted rerun.
Network evidence: request 82 POST /api/system {action: stop} returned success:true; request 85 POST /api/system {action: start} returned success:true.
